text:
ByOscar Hartzog

Soccertournaments are officially underway at the2024 Paris Summer Olympics. 16 nations are competing in the men’s tournament, and 12 are facing off in the women’s competition.

The US men’s national soccer team — who started as one of the favorites — stuttered in their firstOlympicsgame of the tournament, losing 3-0 to host country France. Next, they’ll face New Zealand in a must-win match if they want to stay in the running. Spain, Argentina, France, and Morocco are also among the teams most likely to take home medals this year.

The women’s US side has seen better success out of the gates, taking down Zambia 3-0. On Sunday they take on Germany — one of the favorites in the women’s tournament — in a highly-anticipated match.

If you’re looking to watch Olympics soccer online during the 2024 games, read on. Below is a quick guide on where tolivestreamOlympics soccer games without cable, including ways to watch Olympics soccer for free.

Olympics soccer matches are being broadcast on USA Network and NBC, and Telemundo in Spanish. Fans without cable can watch Olympics soccer online usingPeacock, or live TV streaming services likeDirecTV Stream,Hulu + Live TV, fubo, andSling, which carry the channels above.

Here’s a breakdown of your best options:

Peacocktakes the gold medal for Olympics streaming this year, offering livestreams of every soccer game, plus special whip-around coverage if you want to watch other events. Peacock is also very affordable at just $7.99 a month, although there’s no free trial.



Peacock offers both live and on-demand content, including sports like WWE, Golf, and Olympics, and series likeThe OfficeandYellowstone. Subscriptions start at $7.99 a month.

Soccer fans can also watch Olympics games with live TV streaming services that carry NBC and USA Network.DirecTV Streamis a good pick if you go this route, offering streams of both channels for $79.99 a month. However, you get afive-day free trialto start.



DirecTV Stream is one of the most comprehensive live TV streaming services with up to 160+ channels, including local channels, regional sports networks, and all popular national channels. Packages start at $79.99 a month and all subscriptions start with a five-day free trial.

Hulu + Live TVwill also let you watch Olympics soccer online with livestreams of NBC and USA Network. The service starts with athree-day free trialand then costs $76.99 a month after that.



Hulu + Live TV bundles together Hulu’s on-demand library and over 95 live TV channels, including local channels and almost all popular national channels. Subscriptions also include ESPN+ and Disney+ at no additional cost. Hulu + Live TV costs $76.99 a month after a three-day free trial.

fubooffers aseven-day free trialand carries both NBC and USA Network for soccer livestreams from the Olympics. After the free trial, packages start at $79.99 a month.



fubo’s massive streaming plans carry up to 275+ channels, and you can get even more depending on your location. Packages start at $79.99 a month, and you get seven days to try the service for free.

Slingis a more affordable cable streaming option, offering NBC and USA Network livestreams in its Blue package. This plan has 46 channels in total and costs $45 a month (no free trial).



Sling is one of the most affordable live TV streaming services, with packages starting at $40 a month. You can get up to 46 channels in the Sling Orange + Blue plan, plus more withSling’s add-ons.

Want to watch Olympics soccer for free? Try using free trials fromDirecTV Stream,Hulu + Live TV, andfubo. All of these trials will get you free Olympics soccer streams while the trial window lasts, as long as you cancel before the trial ends. GetDirecTV Stream’s five-day free trial here,Hulu + Live TV’s trial here, orfubo’s seven-day free trial here.

The Olympics soccer tournaments kicked off on July 24 with group stage games, and run through the men’s gold medal match on Aug 9 and the women’s final on Aug 10. Matches start between 9 a.m. ET and 3 p.m. ET. Here’s a breakdown of the Olympics soccer schedule for each stage:

Men’s Olympics Soccer TournamentGroup Stage: July 24-30Quarterfinals: Aug 2Semifinals: Aug 5Bronze Medal Match: Aug 8Gold Medal Match: Aug 9

Women’s Olympics Soccer TournamentGroup Stage: July 25-31Quarterfinals: Aug 3Semifinals: Aug 6Bronze Medal Match: Aug 9Gold Medal Match: Aug 10

We want to hear it. Send us a tip using our anonymous form.

title: How to Watch 2024 Olympics Soccer Games Online for Free Without Cable
author: Oscar Hartzog
description: Here’s how to watch Olympics soccer online during the 2024 Paris Olympics, including how to get free Olympics soccer livestreams without cable.
